menu.nice_actions.uninstall.description: Proceeding removes all needed entries. Certain Progress will be lost forever. Don't forget to delete the Nice Actions file afterwards.
menu.nice_actions.uninstall.description_: Keep in mind that already existing Items, Entities, generated Loot and Structures can't be removed automatically.
option.nice_actions.transfer_enchantment:
Transfers enchantments from the item in your offhand to the item in the mainhand.

Destroys the offhand item in the process.

The offhand item must not be an Enchanted Book.

The mainhand item must not already be enchanted.

Mainhand item has to be the same type as offhand item.
